dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Combined view of your planted trees
dashboard.growthHint: Number of measurements across all trees
dashboard.plantFirst: Plant your first tree to see growth charts
dashboard.plantFirstCal: Plant your first tree to see events
dashboard.badgesEmpty: Keep caring for your trees to earn badges!
dashboard.certificateBanner: You reached Eco‑Ambassador! Open your certificate.

tree.welcomeBody: Plant your first tree and track growth. Every forest starts with one seed!
tree.dropPhotos: Drop images here or click to select
tree.maxTrees: You can register up to 3 trees.
tree.passportHint: Age, species, location, and health history are stored in the app.
tree.mapPickHint: Click the map to set coordinates (optional).
tree.waterFaq: About 4–6 litres per watering. Tap to record one watering.

badges.pageSubtitle: Earn badges by watering, measuring, and caring for your trees — including secret ones.

first_sip.name: First sip
first_sip.desc: You gave your tree its very first drink!

thirst_quencher.name: Thirst quencher
thirst_quencher.desc: You are mastering keeping your tree happy and hydrated.

rainmaker.name: Rainmaker
rainmaker.desc: Your tree is grateful for all that care.

hydration_hero.name: Hydration hero
hydration_hero.desc: You are officially a champion waterer!

monsoon_master.name: Monsoon master
monsoon_master.desc: So much water — so much dedication.

oceans_bounty.name: Ocean's bounty
oceans_bounty.desc: Enough watering cans to float a boat!

aqua_legend.name: Aqua legend
aqua_legend.desc: Your tree might feel like it lives in a rainforest.

tiny_sprout.name: Tiny sprout
tiny_sprout.desc: Your seedling is off to a promising start!

growing_sapling.name: Growing sapling
growing_sapling.desc: Shoot for the sky — your tree sure is.

skyward_seedling.name: Skyward seedling
skyward_seedling.desc: Look how tall your little friend is getting!

branch_ambassador.name: Branch ambassador
branch_ambassador.desc: Time to wave hello to the birds.

first_week.name: First week
first_week.desc: Your tree survived its first week!

month_milestone.name: Month milestone
month_milestone.desc: A month of dedicated tree care — well done!

season_star.name: Season star
season_star.desc: Three months strong through wind and weather!

half_year_hero.name: Half-year hero
half_year_hero.desc: Six months of growth and counting!

year_champion.name: Year champion
year_champion.desc: Happy first birthday to your tree!

water_streak_7.name: Week warrior
water_streak_7.desc: Water your trees on 7 consecutive calendar days.

tree_whisperer.name: Tree whisperer
tree_whisperer.desc: Update your tree's measurements 5 days in a row

green_guardian.name: Green guardian
green_guardian.desc: Water all your trees on the same day

growth_spurt.name: Growth spurt
growth_spurt.desc: Tree grows more than 10 cm in a week

lesson.title: Eco lesson + quiz
lesson.intro: Instead of a full video lesson, here is one short question. Correct answer: +50 XP (once).
lesson.question: Which tree is especially common across much of Mongolia?

certificate.title: Eco‑Ambassador certificate
certificate.body: Awarded in TreeDoctor to learners who reach 5,000+ XP.
certificate.name: Name
certificate.needLevel: Reach 5,000 XP to unlock the certificate.

landing.heroTitle: A collaboration platform for school tree projects
landing.heroSub: Growth, watering, and health data in one place.
